---
title: "WDI 2022 Interactive Dashboard (Bonus)"
author: "Sarah Shao"
date: 2026-02-20
format:
  dashboard:
    theme: cosmo
    orientation: columns
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Setup

```{python}
import os
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import panel as pn
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

pn.extension()  # enable panel in HTML

# Load dataset (prefer local wdi.csv in repo)
local_path = "wdi.csv"
url = "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/danilofreire/qtm350/main/assignments/wdi.csv"

if os.path.exists(local_path):
    wdi = pd.read_csv(local_path)
else:
    wdi = pd.read_csv(url)

# Keep a clean copy
df = wdi.copy()

# Candidate indicators (use your assignment columns)
indicator_map = {
    "GDP per Capita (current US$)": "gdp_per_capita",
    "Inflation Rate (%)": "inflation_rate",
    "GDP Growth Rate (%)": "gdp_growth_rate",
    "Exports (% of GDP)": "exports_gdp_share",
}

# Some datasets may not include all columns; keep only existing ones
indicator_map = {k: v for k, v in indicator_map.items() if v in df.columns}

df["country"] = df["country"].astype(str)

countries = ["All"] + sorted(df["country"].dropna().unique().tolist())
```

## Controls {.sidebar}
```{python}
country_selector = pn.widgets.Select(
    name="Country",
    options=countries,
    value="All"
)

indicator_selector = pn.widgets.Select(
    name="Indicator (Histogram)",
    options=list(indicator_map.keys()),
    value=list(indicator_map.keys())[0] if len(indicator_map) > 0 else None
)

bins_slider = pn.widgets.IntSlider(
    name="Histogram bins",
    start=10, end=60, step=5, value=30
)

dropna_toggle = pn.widgets.Checkbox(
    name="Drop missing values (NA)",
    value=True
)

pn.Column(
    "### Filters",
    country_selector,
    indicator_selector,
    bins_slider,
    dropna_toggle
)
```

## Histogram
```{python}
@pn.depends(
    country=country_selector.param.value,
    indicator_label=indicator_selector.param.value,
    bins=bins_slider.param.value,
    dropna=dropna_toggle.param.value
)
def hist_plot(country, indicator_label, bins, dropna):
    if indicator_label is None:
        return pn.pane.Markdown("No indicators available in this dataset.")

    col = indicator_map[indicator_label]

    data = df if country == "All" else df[df["country"] == country]
    x = data[col]

    if dropna:
        x = x.dropna()

    if x.empty:
        return pn.pane.Markdown("No data available for the selected options.")

    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(8, 3.8))
    ax.hist(x, bins=bins)
    ax.set_title(f"Distribution of {indicator_label} ({country})")
    ax.set_xlabel(indicator_label)
    ax.set_ylabel("Number of Countries")
    ax.grid(True, alpha=0.3)

    plt.close(fig)
    return pn.pane.Matplotlib(fig, tight=True)

pn.Column(
    "### Distribution (Interactive)",
    hist_plot,
    pn.pane.Markdown("*Source: World Bank, World Development Indicators (2022).*")
)
```

## Scatter Plot
```{python}
# Two-axis scatter: GDP per Capita vs Inflation (common & interpretable)
x_default = "gdp_per_capita" if "gdp_per_capita" in df.columns else None
y_default = "inflation_rate" if "inflation_rate" in df.columns else None

scatter_x = pn.widgets.Select(
    name="X-axis",
    options=[v for v in indicator_map.values()],
    value=x_default if x_default in indicator_map.values() else list(indicator_map.values())[0]
)

scatter_y = pn.widgets.Select(
    name="Y-axis",
    options=[v for v in indicator_map.values()],
    value=y_default if y_default in indicator_map.values() else list(indicator_map.values())[0]
)

@pn.depends(
    country=country_selector.param.value,
    xcol=scatter_x.param.value,
    ycol=scatter_y.param.value,
    dropna=dropna_toggle.param.value
)
def scatter_plot(country, xcol, ycol, dropna):
    data = df if country == "All" else df[df["country"] == country]

    x = data[xcol]
    y = data[ycol]

    if dropna:
        keep = (~x.isna()) & (~y.isna())
        x = x[keep]
        y = y[keep]

    if len(x) == 0:
        return pn.pane.Markdown("No data available for the selected options.")

    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(8, 4.2))
    ax.scatter(x, y, alpha=0.7)
    ax.set_title(f"{xcol} vs {ycol} ({country})")
    ax.set_xlabel(xcol)
    ax.set_ylabel(ycol)
    ax.grid(True, alpha=0.3)

    plt.close(fig)
    return pn.pane.Matplotlib(fig, tight=True)

pn.Column(
    "### Relationship (Interactive)",
    pn.Row(scatter_x, scatter_y),
    scatter_plot,
    pn.pane.Markdown("*Source: World Bank, World Development Indicators (2022).*")
)
```
